results.title: Texas Longhorns head coach Sean Miller in the first half against the Gonzaga Bulldogs during a second round game of the men's 2026 NCAA Tournament at Moda Center.
results.description: The Texas Longhorns are adding another major opponent to their non-conference schedule.

results.title: Chicago Bears tight ends Colston Loveland and Cole Kmet.
results.description: The Chicago Bears have now wrapped up their OTAs. Here's who emerged as the biggest winners and losers from the second and final week of this portion of the offseason program.

results.title: Lamine Yamal broke a record Jude Bellingham set during his debut season in Spain.
results.description: The remarkable Barcelona teenager continues to shatter records with incredible ease.

results.title: Nov 16, 2025; Madrid, Spain; Miami Dolphins cornerback JuJu Brents (32) runs onto the field prior to the 2025 NFL Madrid Game against the Washington Commanders at Santiago Bernabeu Stadium. Mandatory Credit: Kirby Lee-Imagn Images
results.description: Brents is looking to build off last season's performance before he was derailed by injury

results.title: Apr 7, 2026; Raleigh, North Carolina, USA; Boston Bruins center Pavel Zacha (18) celebrates his goal against the Carolina Hurricanes during the third period at Lenovo Center. Mandatory Credit: James Guillory-Imagn Images
results.description: A pair of Bruins received votes in the final tally for the 2026 Frank J. Selke Trophy which was awarded to Montreal’s Nick Suzuki.
